entries.note: Corrected a data-processing error that had mislabeled the largest support form-letter campaign (~2,400 comments) as opposed. Root cause: the regulations.gov export assigns the same Document ID to a few different comments, which crossed some classifications during a data rebuild. Fixed by matching each comment's classification to its own text, and hardened so duplicate IDs are handled automatically going forward. Stance totals restored to 94% oppose / 5% support.
Updated to the latest set of public comments (53,181 total).
